segments.text: Then answered Bildad the Shuhite, and said,
Dominion and fear are with him, he maketh peace in his high places.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Is there any number of his armies? and upon whom doth not his light arise?
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: How then can man be justified with God? or how can he be clean that is born of a woman?
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Behold even to the moon, and it shineth not; yea, the stars are not pure in his sight.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: How much less man, that is a worm? and the son of man, which is a worm?
segments.speaker: Bildad
